query: SELECT id, title, LENGTH(sheetMusicAbc) as total_len, LENGTH(sheetMusicAbc) - LENGTH(REPLACE(sheetMusicAbc, '\n', '')) as newline_count, LENGTH(sheetMusicAbc) - LENGTH(REPLACE(sheetMusicAbc, ';', '')) as semicolon_count, SUBSTRING(sheetMusicAbc, 1, 100) as first_100 FROM songs WHERE sheetMusicAbc IS NOT NULL ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 3;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27tCrNWdmQHZC2L.1303e64f5668 --database Q3oEbCsP6DUj527aoyypq7 --execute SELECT id, title, LENGTH(sheetMusicAbc) as total_len, LENGTH(sheetMusicAbc) - LENGTH(REPLACE(sheetMusicAbc, '\n', '')) as newline_count, LENGTH(sheetMusicAbc) - LENGTH(REPLACE(sheetMusicAbc, ';', '')) as semicolon_count, SUBSTRING(sheetMusicAbc, 1, 100) as first_100 FROM songs WHERE sheetMusicAbc IS NOT NULL ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 3;
